meaning: n.微孔性 微孔率 [冶]显微疏松(指非常微小、只有借助于显微镜才可见到的孔隙)
examples: Water in microporosity or other small pores.
This, in turn, creates a finished die cast product with extremely low levels of microporosity defects.
